page.title: Choose the perfect plan for your ISP
page.subtitle: Plans designed for internet providers of all sizes. No long-term contracts, cancel anytime.

changePlan.question: Can I change my plan at any time?
changePlan.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan whenever you need. Changes take effect in your next billing cycle and billing is adjusted proportionally.

freeTrial.question: Is there a free trial period?
freeTrial.answer: All plans include a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept credit and debit cards, PSE, bank transfers, and cash payments through authorized points.

modules.question: Do I need to hire all modules?
modules.answer: No, each plan includes specific features. You can start with the basics and activate additional modules as you grow.

annualDiscount.question: Do you offer a discount for annual payment?
annualDiscount.answer: Yes, by choosing annual billing you save 20% compared to the monthly price. The discount is applied automatically when you select the annual option.

ctaSection.title: Ready to take your ISP to the next level?
ctaSection.subtitle: Start your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
